use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF POSTSURGICAL PAIN PROVIDING ANALGESIA TO A PATIENT FOR UP TO 72 HOURS, FOR EXAMPLE, AFTER BUNIONECTOMY, OPEN INGUINAL HERNIORRHAPHY, OR TOTAL KNEE ARTHROPLASTY VIA SOFT TISSUE OR PERIARTICULAR INSTILLATION
